text:
Created attachment 257577
How to run FFXIV v4

wine-devel: 10.0.r5 -> 10.1
wine: 9.0_6 -> 10.0
wine-proton: 9.0.3

10.1 still does not load the launcher.
See: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=48006

wine-proton can run the launcher but is not able to start the game.
